[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a large plush character with a sleepy, closed-eye expression while a smaller inset video window in the lower-right displays a person.

The main subject is a gray-and-pink plush figure with a rounded face, closed eyes drawn in black with curved lines, a small curved smile, and pink triangular ear-like shapes on top. The plush appears to be filling most of the frame, with the top of the character cut off slightly by the image boundaries.

The setting is unclear because the background is mostly obscured by the plush and the inset window. The lighting in the main image appears soft and even. In the inset window, the visible person is seated indoors with a plain background; details are limited to face and upper shoulders. The person is looking toward the camera, with a neutral to slightly engaged expression, and appears to be wearing a dark top.

No important visible text detected.

The image combines a plush character close-up with a small inset video of a person in the corner. It appears to be a screen-style composite showing both the plush and the live-view inset simultaneously.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
